response.overview: Bound by shared dreams and unforgettable adventures, college best friends Ulani and Sienna revisits their memories throughout the years, sharing moments of joy and growth, recalling the experiences that defined their friendship. But as graduation nears and adulthood looms ahead, the two stands at the threshold of a new chapter. With their future uncertain and the comfort of familiarity slipping away, Ulani and Sienna must navigate what it truly means to grow up without growing apart.
response.title: About Us
